sub_mercurian.description: Bare‐bones rocky world, thinner crust, minimal atmosphere.

sub_earth.description: Smaller than Earth but still geologically active.

earth_like.description: Rocky with plate tectonics, liquid water, breathable air.

super_earth.description: Large rocky world; higher gravity, thicker atmosphere.

mini_neptune.description: Small ice‐rich envelope over a rocky core.

desert.description: Dry world, sparse vegetation or none at all.

rainforest.description: Thick jungles, heavy precipitation, high biomass.

acid_ocean.description: Sulfuric or hydrochloric acid seas, corrosive skies.

gas_giant.description: Massive hydrogen‐helium envelope, no solid surface.

hot_jupiter.description: Orbits extremely close to its star, blistering temperatures.

warm_jupiter.description: Closer in than Jupiter but farther than a hot‐Jupiter.

cold_jupiter.description: Far from its star, deep cold atmosphere.

ice_giant.description: Rich in volatiles like water, ammonia; thick icy mantle.

puffy.description: Extremely low density, bloated by stellar heating.

chthonian.description: Stripped gas giant core, volcanic, metal‐rich.

mega_iron.description: Almost pure iron/nickel, high density, magnetic.

carbon.description: Graphite and hydrocarbons dominate; tar‐like seas.

diamond.description: High pressure turns carbon shell into diamond layer.

magma_planet.description: Surface is a global magma bath, constant eruptions.

plasma.description: Ionized atmosphere, glows under stellar wind.

habitable.description: Within habitable zone, stable climate, liquid water.

dwarf.description: Small icy/rocky body, like Pluto or Ceres.

centaur.description: Icy‐rock hybrid between Jupiter and Neptune orbits.

planetesimal.description: Building block of planets, tiny rock/ice clump.

trojan_asteroid.description: Co‐orbiting in Lagrange points of a larger planet.

comet.description: Dirty snowball: ice, dust, develops tail near star.

long_period_comet.description: Orbits over 200 years, from distant Oort cloud.
